sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93916" key="sqenoblabh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σθενοβλᾰβής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n93916.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hurting the strength, weakening</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:82" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.82</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
